pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8, preventing the use of Java 21 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency version to a newer release compatible with the updated project stack.
